# tenzir_organization_members (Data Source)

List all members of a Tenzir Platform organization, including members managed outside of Terraform (e.g. provisioned via invitations or workload identity federation).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization_id` (String) Identifier of the organization whose members are listed.

### Read-Only

- `members` (Attributes List) All members of the organization. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--members))

<a id="nestedatt--members"></a>
### Nested Schema for `members`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String) Email address from the user's profile. Null until the user has logged in at least once.
- `name` (String) Display name from the user's profile. Null until the user has logged in at least once.
- `role` (String) Role of the member in the organization, `member` or `admin`.
- `user_id` (String) Unique identifier of the user.
